capabilities.name: Workspace, Users, And Governance
capabilities.description: Business workspace, user accounts, role-based access, collaboration, approvals, and future enterprise controls.

capabilities.name: Supplier And Vendor Management
capabilities.description: Vendor connections, profiles, grouping, account metadata, connection monitoring, re-authentication, onboarding, notes, and performance tracking.

capabilities.name: Product Aggregation
capabilities.description: Single, bulk, category, and collection product import with product metadata, assets, specifications, SKUs, UPCs, dimensions, documents, warranty information, and version history.

capabilities.name: Service Aggregation
capabilities.description: Import and manage supplier services, service pricing tables, requirements, turnaround times, availability, and documentation.

capabilities.name: Unified Asset Library
capabilities.description: Central repository for products, services, bundles, recipes, catalog assets, categories, tags, collections, folders, saved views, and search.

capabilities.name: Pricing, Cost, And Margin Engine
capabilities.description: Product pricing, service pricing, advanced pricing, cost breakdowns, margin calculations, margin protection, thresholds, and approvals.

capabilities.name: Bundle And Production Recipe Builder
capabilities.description: Reusable combinations of products, services, labor, packaging, shipping, setup, installation, production formulas, quantity scaling, and dynamic pricing updates.

capabilities.name: Catalog, Price Book, Quote, And Proposal Output
capabilities.description: Branded catalogs, customer or project price books, quote generation, proposals, approvals, revisions, sharing, and export.

capabilities.name: Customer Management And Portals
capabilities.description: Customer profiles, groups, notes, purchase history, assigned pricing tiers, customer portals, favorites, quote requests, and secure catalog access.

capabilities.name: Monitoring, Automation, Analytics, AI, And Integrations
capabilities.description: Supplier change monitoring, inventory and service availability alerts, approval workflows, reporting, AI assistants, natural language search, ecommerce, CRM, accounting, and storage integrations.

capability_dependencies.reason: Product import needs supplier source context.
Service import needs supplier source context.
Pricing and margin calculations consume normalized products, services, and asset organization.
Bundles and recipes require product, service, cost, and pricing components.
Customer-facing outputs depend on approved assets, pricing, and assembled offerings.
